title: Creeper Girl
description: Creeper is now a shy girl. 0w0
body:
This texture pack transforms the classic Creeper into an adorable Creeper Girl, giving her the personality of a shy, timid girl who often hides behind trees, looks away nervously, and tries her best not to explode… unless startled.
Her custom model and textures bring a softer, cuter look that blends naturally into Minecraft while adding a charming new atmosphere to your world.

To work properly, this texture pack requires OptiFine (CEM).
If you use Fabric or Quilt, it needs ETF (Entity Texture Features) and EMF (Entity Model Features).
It works on versions higher and lower than 1.21, as long as CEM is supported.
